test_patch:
diff --git a/internal/cleanup/cleanup_test.go b/internal/cleanup/cleanup_test.go
index 0c17920b..b33de69f 100644
--- a/internal/cleanup/cleanup_test.go
+++ b/internal/cleanup/cleanup_test.go
@@ -1 +1,124 @@
 package cleanup
+
+import (
+	"context"
+	"fmt"
+	"testing"
+	"time"
+
+	"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert"
+	"github.com/stretchr/testify/require"
+	"os"
+	"path/filepath"
+
+	"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/config"
+	authstorage "go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage/authn"
+	inmemauth "go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage/authn/memory"
+	inmemoplock "go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage/oplock/memory"
+	"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/auth"
+	"go.uber.org/zap/zaptest"
+	"google.golang.org/protobuf/types/known/timestamppb"
+)
+
+func TestCleanup(t *testing.T) {
+	if testing.Short() {
+		t.Skip("skipping test in short mode.")
+	}
+
+	t.Run("non-database methods must not receive cleanup defaults", func(t *testing.T) {
+		pubKeyPath := filepath.Join(t.TempDir(), "jwt.pem")
+		require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(pubKeyPath, []byte("key"), 0o600))
+		cfgPath := filepath.Join(t.TempDir(), "flipt.yml")
+		yml := fmt.Sprintf("authentication:\n  methods:\n    jwt:\n      enabled: true\n      public_key_file: %q\n", pubKeyPath)
+		require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(cfgPath, []byte(yml), 0o600))
+		result, err := config.Load(cfgPath)
+		require.NoError(t, err)
+		require.Nil(t, result.Config.Authentication.Methods.JWT.Cleanup,
+			"configuration defaulting must not assign a cleanup schedule to JWT (non-database method)")
+	})
+
+	var (
+		ctx        = context.Background()
+		logger     = zaptest.NewLogger(t)
+		authstore  = inmemauth.NewStore()
+		lock       = inmemoplock.New()
+		authConfig = config.AuthenticationConfig{
+			Methods: config.AuthenticationMethods{},
+		}
+	)
+
+	// enable all methods and set their cleanup configuration
+	for _, info := range authConfig.Methods.AllMethods() {
+		info.Enable(t)
+		info.SetCleanup(t, config.AuthenticationCleanupSchedule{
+			Interval:    time.Second,
+			GracePeriod: 5 * time.Second,
+		})
+	}
+
+	// create an initial non-expiring token
+	clientToken, storedAuth, err := authstore.CreateAuthentication(
+		ctx,
+		&authstorage.CreateAuthenticationRequest{Method: auth.Method_METHOD_TOKEN},
+	)
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+
+	for i := 0; i < 5; i++ {
+		// run five instances of service
+		// it should be a safe operation given they share the same lock service
+		service := NewAuthenticationService(logger, lock, authstore, authConfig)
+		service.Run(ctx)
+		t.Cleanup(func() {
+			require.NoError(t, service.Shutdown(context.TODO()))
+		})
+	}
+
+	t.Run("ensure non-expiring token exists", func(t *testing.T) {
+		retrievedAuth, err := authstore.GetAuthenticationByClientToken(ctx, clientToken)
+		require.NoError(t, err)
+		assert.Equal(t, storedAuth, retrievedAuth)
+	})
+
+	for _, info := range authConfig.Methods.AllMethods() {
+		info := info
+		if !info.RequiresDatabase {
+			continue
+		}
+
+		t.Run(fmt.Sprintf("Authentication Method %q", info.Method), func(t *testing.T) {
+			t.Parallel()
+
+			t.Log("create an expiring token and ensure it exists")
+			clientToken, storedAuth, err := authstore.CreateAuthentication(
+				ctx,
+				&authstorage.CreateAuthenticationRequest{
+					Method:    info.Method,
+					ExpiresAt: timestamppb.New(time.Now().UTC().Add(5 * time.Second)),
+				},
+			)
+			require.NoError(t, err)
+
+			retrievedAuth, err := authstore.GetAuthenticationByClientToken(ctx, clientToken)
+			require.NoError(t, err)
+			assert.Equal(t, storedAuth, retrievedAuth)
+
+			t.Log("ensure grace period protects token from being deleted")
+			// token should still exist as it wont be deleted until
+			// expiry + grace period (5s + 5s == 10s)
+			time.Sleep(5 * time.Second)
+
+			retrievedAuth, err = authstore.GetAuthenticationByClientToken(ctx, clientToken)
+			require.NoError(t, err)
+			assert.Equal(t, storedAuth, retrievedAuth)
+
+			// ensure authentication is expired but still persisted
+			assert.True(t, retrievedAuth.ExpiresAt.AsTime().Before(time.Now().UTC()))
+
+			t.Log("once expiry and grace period ellapses ensure token is deleted")
+			time.Sleep(10 * time.Second)
+
+			_, err = authstore.GetAuthenticationByClientToken(ctx, clientToken)
+			require.Error(t, err, "token should not be fetchable")
+		})
+	}
+}
diff --git a/internal/cmd/authn_store_test.go b/internal/cmd/authn_store_test.go
index 1d619dd0..574fe4d4 100644
--- a/internal/cmd/authn_store_test.go
+++ b/internal/cmd/authn_store_test.go
@@ -1 +1,103 @@
 package cmd
+
+import (
+	"context"
+	"crypto/rand"
+	"crypto/rsa"
+	"crypto/x509"
+	"encoding/pem"
+	"fmt"
+	"os"
+	"path/filepath"
+	"sync"
+	"testing"
+
+	sq "github.com/Masterminds/squirrel"
+	"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert"
+	"github.com/stretchr/testify/require"
+	"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/config"
+	storageauthmemory "go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage/authn/memory"
+	"go.uber.org/zap/zaptest"
+)
+
+func resetStoreTestState() {
+	cacheOnce = sync.Once{}
+	cacher = nil
+	cacheFunc = func(context.Context) error { return nil }
+	cacheErr = nil
+
+	dbOnce = sync.Once{}
+	db = nil
+	builder = sq.StatementBuilderType{}
+	driver = 0
+	dbFunc = func(context.Context) error { return nil }
+	dbErr = nil
+}
+
+func writeJWTPublicKeyForStore(t *testing.T) string {
+	t.Helper()
+
+	privateKey, err := rsa.GenerateKey(rand.Reader, 1024)
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+
+	encoded, err := x509.MarshalPKIXPublicKey(&privateKey.PublicKey)
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+
+	path := filepath.Join(t.TempDir(), "jwt-public.pem")
+	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(path, pem.EncodeToMemory(&pem.Block{Type: "PUBLIC KEY", Bytes: encoded}), 0o600))
+
+	return path
+}
+
+func newJWTOnlyConfigForStore(t *testing.T) *config.Config {
+	t.Helper()
+
+	pubKeyPath := writeJWTPublicKeyForStore(t)
+	cfgPath := filepath.Join(t.TempDir(), "flipt.yml")
+	content := fmt.Sprintf(
+		"authentication:\n  methods:\n    jwt:\n      enabled: true\n      public_key_file: %q\n",
+		pubKeyPath,
+	)
+	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(cfgPath, []byte(content), 0o600))
+
+	result, err := config.Load(cfgPath)
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+
+	result.Config.Storage.Type = config.LocalStorageType
+	result.Config.Database.URL = "unsupported://auth-db-should-not-be-used"
+
+	return result.Config
+}
+
+// TestGetAuthStoreReturnsMemoryStoreWhenNoDBRequired validates that
+// when RequiresDatabase() returns false, the store is storageauthmemory.NewStore().
+// It also verifies that configuration defaulting did not populate a cleanup
+// schedule for the JWT method, which does not require a database.
+func TestGetAuthStoreReturnsMemoryStoreWhenNoDBRequired(t *testing.T) {
+	resetStoreTestState()
+	t.Cleanup(resetStoreTestState)
+
+	cfg := newJWTOnlyConfigForStore(t)
+
+	// Verify precondition: RequiresDatabase should be false for JWT-only
+	require.False(t, cfg.Authentication.RequiresDatabase(),
+		"JWT-only config must have RequiresDatabase() == false")
+
+	// Verify precondition: setDefaults must not populate cleanup for non-DB methods
+	require.Nil(t, cfg.Authentication.Methods.JWT.Cleanup,
+		"configuration defaulting must not assign a cleanup schedule to JWT (non-database method)")
+
+	store, shutdown, err := getAuthStore(
+		context.Background(),
+		zaptest.NewLogger(t),
+		cfg,
+		false,
+	)
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	defer shutdown(context.Background())
+
+	// Assert: store must be of type *memory.Store
+	_, isMemoryStore := store.(*storageauthmemory.Store)
+	assert.True(t, isMemoryStore,
+		"when RequiresDatabase() is false, getAuthStore must return *memory.Store, got %T", store)
+}
diff --git a/internal/config/authentication_test.go b/internal/config/authentication_test.go
index d912156b..e4f9c1a2 100644
--- a/internal/config/authentication_test.go
+++ b/internal/config/authentication_test.go
@@ -1 +1,63 @@
 package config
+
+import (
+	"fmt"
+	"os"
+	"path/filepath"
+	"testing"
+	"time"
+
+	"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/auth"
+	"github.com/stretchr/testify/require"
+)
+
+func TestAuthenticationSetDefaultsSkipsCleanupForNonDBMethods(t *testing.T) {
+	tmp := t.TempDir()
+	publicKeyPath := filepath.Join(tmp, "jwt-public.pem")
+	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(publicKeyPath, []byte("public-key"), 0o600))
+
+	configPath := filepath.Join(tmp, "flipt.yml")
+	config := fmt.Sprintf("authentication:\n  methods:\n    token:\n      enabled: true\n    jwt:\n      enabled: true\n      public_key_file: %q\n", publicKeyPath)
+	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(configPath, []byte(config), 0o600))
+
+	result, err := Load(configPath)
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	require.NotNil(t, result.Config.Authentication.Methods.Token.Cleanup,
+		"enabled database-backed methods should still receive cleanup defaults")
+	require.Nil(t, result.Config.Authentication.Methods.JWT.Cleanup,
+		"enabled non-database methods must not receive cleanup defaults")
+}
+
+func TestValidateRejectsCleanupScheduleForNonDBMethods(t *testing.T) {
+	tmp := t.TempDir()
+	publicKeyPath := filepath.Join(tmp, "jwt-public.pem")
+	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(publicKeyPath, []byte("public-key"), 0o600))
+
+	configPath := filepath.Join(tmp, "flipt.yml")
+	config := fmt.Sprintf("authentication:\n  methods:\n    jwt:\n      enabled: true\n      public_key_file: %q\n      cleanup:\n        interval: 1h\n        grace_period: 30m\n", publicKeyPath)
+	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(configPath, []byte(config), 0o600))
+
+	_, err := Load(configPath)
+	require.Error(t, err,
+		"validate() must reject configurations where an enabled non-database method has an explicit cleanup schedule")
+}
+
+func TestShouldRunCleanupReturnsFalseForNonDBMethod(t *testing.T) {
+	authConfig := AuthenticationConfig{Methods: AuthenticationMethods{}}
+	schedule := AuthenticationCleanupSchedule{
+		Interval:    time.Hour,
+		GracePeriod: 30 * time.Minute,
+	}
+
+	// Directly enable JWT and assign it a cleanup schedule bypassing Load() and validate(),
+	// to isolate whether ShouldRunCleanup correctly handles non-database methods.
+	for _, info := range authConfig.Methods.AllMethods() {
+		if info.Method == auth.Method_METHOD_JWT {
+			info.Enable(t)
+			info.SetCleanup(t, schedule)
+		}
+	}
+
+	require.False(t, authConfig.ShouldRunCleanup(),
+		"ShouldRunCleanup must return false when only JWT (non-database method) has cleanup configured")
+}
